About Rapid Roof Solutions

Experienced Roofing Specialists

Servicing Greater Brisbane & the Sunshine Coast, we are an experienced roofing repair company that aims to help Queensland homes by installing and removing all aspects of roofing, guttering, and wall cladding. We use effective and sustainable methods and processes which all aim to ensure that your house stays protected from external factors for years to come, and without worry.

Read More

Services We Offer

We provide a range of services for Residential, Commercial, and Industrial roofing.

See All

Metal Roof Replacement

Commercial Roofs

Asbestos Removal

Insulated Panel Roof Systems

Re-guttering

Roof Reports and Maintenance

Our Projects

Check out our latest projects to see why our customers recommend us!

## About Rapid Roof Solutions

### Experienced Roofing Specialists

Servicing Greater Brisbane & the Sunshine Coast, we are an experienced roofing repair company that aims to help Queensland homes by installing and removing all aspects of roofing, guttering, and wall cladding. We use effective and sustainable methods and processes which all aim to ensure that your house stays protected from external factors for years to come, and without worry.

[Read More](https://rapidroofsolutions.com.au/about/)

![](https://rapidroofsolutions.com.au/wp-content/themes/yootheme/cache/dc/Rapid-Contact-Hero-1-V2-dc5d07c6.jpeg)

### Services We Offer

We provide a range of services for Residential, Commercial, and Industrial roofing.

[See All](https://rapidroofsolutions.com.au/services/)

  • About Us

    Providing an old fashioned and honest service to the people of South East Queensland. We install and remove all aspects of roofing, guttering and wall cladding.

    Request a Quote Our Services

Glad to Say We’re

Licensed, Insured & Experienced

Servicing the Greater Brisbane & Sunshine Coast of Queensland

Our professional team have years of experience with roofing & guttering services right across the Greater Brisbane & Sunshine Coast region. Our team takes care and pride in our work, this way you can feel confident knowing every aspect of your roofing job is being looked after in fine detail. 

At Rapid Roof Solutions, we are a fully licenced and insured roofing restoration and repair company that always aim to provide our customers with the best quality job. We are well trained and equipped to tackle any issue that has to do with roofing, ultimately providing multiple benefits to you and your home or building.

Our services range across residential, commercial and industrial settings. 

Get in Touch

Our Mission

To provide our customers with the best service possible, which is honest and trustworthy.

About Us





Providing an old fashioned and honest service to the people of South East Queensland. We install and remove all aspects of roofing, guttering and wall cladding.



[Request a Quote](https://rapidroofsolutions.com.au/contact-us/) [Our Services](https://rapidroofsolutions.com.au/services/)


## Glad to Say We’re

### Licensed, Insured & Experienced

Servicing the Greater Brisbane & Sunshine Coast of Queensland

Our professional team have years of experience with roofing & guttering services right across the Greater Brisbane & Sunshine Coast region. Our team takes care and pride in our work, this way you can feel confident knowing every aspect of your roofing job is being looked after in fine detail.

At Rapid Roof Solutions, we are a fully licenced and insured roofing restoration and repair company that always aim to provide our customers with the best quality job. We are well trained and equipped to tackle any issue that has to do with roofing, ultimately providing multiple benefits to you and your home or building.

Our services range across residential, commercial and industrial settings.

[Get in Touch](https://rapidroofsolutions.com.au/contact-us/)

  • Our Services

    Roof Installations & Repairs

    Request a Quote Our Services

Offering You With A

Range of Roofing Solutions

At Rapid Roofing Solutions, we provide a number of services to ensure that you never have to go to anyone else. Our services span across the residential, commercial & industrial sectors. We use the most effective and innovative methods to protect your roof from weathering and ultimately last for years to come!

Get in Touch

Services We Do

As roof specialists, its our job to provide a quality job. We service multiple areas within the Queensland region including Greater Brisbane, Sunshine Coast, Lutwyche, Stafford, Kedron, Wavell Heights, Banyo, and Hamilton.

Re-Roofing

Reroofing is the act of replacing a damaged, rusted or outdated roof. This is done by removing the old roofing materials and updating the roof structure to comply with current codes and legislations. Then installing  a new roof in your chosen colorbond colour.

Luckily for you, at Rapid Roof Solutions we are highly qualified and capable at achieving both of these methods effectively and efficiently for all customers despite the size of the job!

Commercial Roofs

Rapid Roof Solutions service any type of roofing fitted to a commercial building. Due to the size of these roofs, there are a number of different considerations and requirements that must be taken into account. Therefore it is important to note that not just anyone can do these jobs. At Rapid Roof solutions, we are highly experienced and trained in these jobs, ultimately providing a professional and high quality roof for your commercial building.

Re-Guttering Service

Over time, our gutters can sometimes leak, rust and overflow, which can compromise the whole system of removing excess water during storms and rain. In turn this can create an unsafe space for your family and others. Since we understand just how important gutters are to a home and business, we offer a repair service that will ensure your gutters are working perfectly, no matter how big or small the job is. We’ve got you covered!

Insulated Panel Roof Systems

Insulated panel roof systems are a great method that can provide a weather tight cover, outstanding insulation and a maintenance free ceiling. They have the ability to not only keep you cool during summer, but warm in winter providing the most relaxing atmosphere for anyone to sit in comfortably. They can be used in a range of different settings, from commercial, residential and industrial.

Asbestos Removal

Asbestos is a natural material that can be found in rock fissures and touching an asbestos infested building or property can be extremely dangerous. If it is inhaled, especially for long periods of time, it can cause multiple implications to the human body such as asbestosis, lung cancer and mesothelioma. Therefore it is extremely important for professionals to handle a serious job such as asbestos removal.

But don’t worry, because our team is trained and qualified in asbestos removal, making your life and process easy and efficient.

Gutter Cleaning

Gutters are vital to the flow of rain water away from your home especially during storms. If the  gutters are and remain blocked for long periods of time, this can cause the downspout to get clogged up. It can be clogged up from leaves, debris, and even rubbish. Due to this, it will leave standing water to collect and eventually overflow, causing premature rusting and corosion. That’s why at Rapid Roofing Solutions we provide the a professional gutter cleaning services to ensure your home stays safe and overflowing is prevented.

Cladding

Our cladding and waterproofing services provide a layer of protection between your roof or walls and any possible weather intrusion, enabling you to keep moisture away from causing damage to the surface or structure of your property. Not only will it add another level of defence against the elements, but it also gives a much improved aesthetic look to your roof, increasing its value in both monetary terms as well as making it stand out among other buildings in the area. Rapid Roof Solutions has a variety of different cladding options available so that you can find exactly what suits your building.

Solar Installation

Solar power has become extremely popular for many reasons. It’s renewable energy and environmentally friendly, ultimately eliminating greenhouse gas emissions, minimising the effects of global warming and can help the future of the environment become greener and cleaner. It has also become extremely popular due to its ability to help families save money and trim down on costs, yearly! They can be used for almost any sized building, for residential, commercial or industrial, making it extremely versatile.

Interested in What We Do?

Cobbitty

Service

This 1940 heritage roof was one of our favourite jobs we have completed so far. Our team travelled down to Cobbitty to complete this amazing transformation. Working on any roof that is original or has aged will always come with its struggles, luckily, at Rapid Roof Solutions we love a challenge!

Scroll to the end of the gallery to see our before pictures!

Request A Quote

Paddington

Service

This is an inner-city Brisbane job we completed, city jobs always come with difficult access and limited space, but we always make it work. This roof was completed in one of our favourite Colorbond colours, Windspray. Both our Team and the Client are extremely impressed with the end result!

Scroll to the end of the gallery to see our before pictures!
